project.name: BarrelBook Homepage — Tweaks (Unwrap + Screenshots + Shared Shelves)

required: `npm run lint` is clean (pre-existing warnings in opengraph-image.tsx, privacy/page.tsx, terms/page.tsx, ImageWithFallback.tsx are acceptable)
Non-video screenshots render in a plain rounded container (no PhoneFrame)
Videos (hero + 3 story videos including new SharedShelves) retain the PhoneFrame silhouette

items.title: Unwrap screenshots from PhoneFrame
items.description: Revert FRAME-005. In LandingPage.tsx, the screenshot-grid branch currently renders each screenshot inside <PhoneFrame>. Replace that with a plain rounded container (rounded-2xl, bg-black, subtle border) holding the ImageWithFallback. PhoneFrame stays on HeroVideo and StoryVideo.
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshots render inside a plain rounded container (no bezel, no Dynamic Island pill)
Videos still render inside PhoneFrame (HeroVideo + all StoryVideo instances)
Image aspect ratio preserved via `aspect-[9/19]` or equivalent inner wrapper
alt text preserved

items.title: Add 3rd screenshot to Scan section (WLW4 on the right)
items.description: In the 'Snap a photo. BarrelBook handles the details.' section, add `App Scan WLW4.png` as the third screenshot on the right, restoring the pre-WEB-007 count of 3 photos for this section. Switch the grid to 3 columns on desktop (and 1 on mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: Scan section renders 3 screenshots in order: WLW, WLW3, WLW4
Grid is `grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3` (or responsive equivalent) so on mobile they stack and on tablet+ they render in a row
All 3 screenshots are the same visual size

items.title: Add 3rd screenshot to Collection section (Blantons3 in the middle)
items.description: In the 'Know exactly what you have.' section, insert `App Scan Blantons3.png` as the middle screenshot (between Blantons2 and Blantons4). Switch the grid to 3 columns on desktop (and 1 on mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: Collection section renders 3 screenshots in order: Blantons2, Blantons3, Blantons4
Grid is `grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3` so they stack on mobile and align in a row on tablet+
All 3 screenshots are the same visual size

items.title: Extract poster frame for SharedShelves.mov
items.description: Use ffmpeg to extract a representative frame from /public/SharedShelves.mov at around 1-2s and write it to /public/video-posters/shared-shelves.jpg. Pattern matches the existing posters (bottle-scanning.jpg, pick-a-pour.jpg, spotlight-flights.jpg).
acceptanceCriteria: /public/video-posters/shared-shelves.jpg exists
File is a valid JPEG, roughly matching source aspect (1080x2336)
File size under 500 KB to keep LCP fast

items.title: Replace Share section screenshots with Shared Shelves video
items.description:
In the existing 'Share a shelf worth showing' story section, replace the two screenshots (Catalog1.png + Blantons Details.png) with a StoryVideo driven by /public/SharedShelves.mov. Update the title and description to use the condensed copy supplied by the user:
- Title: 'Share the shelf worth showing off.'
- Description: 'Build your shelf in private, publish when you're ready, and let friends browse the bottles that define your collection.'
Keep the section id='share' and the existing icon (Share2).
acceptanceCriteria: The Share section renders as a StoryVideo (phone-framed SharedShelves video), not as a screenshot grid
Video attributes preserved: autoPlay muted loop playsInline preload='metadata' with poster=/video-posters/shared-shelves.jpg
Title and description updated to the condensed copy
Section id remains 'share' (no dependents to update, but stable for future analytics)

items.title: Verification: types, lint, SUMMARY.md
items.description: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run lint`. Both must be clean. Write SUMMARY.md to the sprint folder.
acceptanceCriteria: `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0
`npm run lint` has no new warnings or errors beyond the 4 pre-existing ones
SUMMARY.md written to the sprint folder
